markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive on Hex's AI-native product and market positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Hex is redefining BI with an AI-native workflow.** It replaces the slow request-queue cycle with instant, trusted answers via natural language, enabling business users to self-serve and freeing data teams for advanced work.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**The platform unifies the full data lifecycle:** natural language queries (`Threads`), advanced data science notebooks, and shareable low-code apps. This eliminates the need for multiple, disconnected tools.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Trust is built on transparency.** The AI's reasoning is fully auditable, showing all data sources, queries, and logic. This is enabled by customer-defined semantic models that provide essential business context.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [**The brand is modern and irreverent,** challenging the status quo of legacy BI tools. Content must be high-quality and align with a specific "internet-brained" tone set by the CEO.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Legacy BI's Broken Workflow

  - [Legacy BI tools (Tableau, Looker) create a slow, frustrating request-queue cycle for business users.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [This forces data teams to spend time on one-off questions instead of high-impact projects.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [The root cause is a fragmented toolchain (querying, science, reporting) that prevents a unified, AI-native experience.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### The Solution: Hex's Unified, AI-Native Platform

  - [Hex solves this by unifying the data workflow in one platform with integrated AI.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**1. Threads (Self-Service):**](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Natural language interface for business users to ask questions.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
      - [AI generates detailed reports with tables, charts, and explanations.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Trust Mechanism:** The AI's reasoning is auditable, showing all sources (projects, semantic models, queries).](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
      - [**Efficiency:** The AI first searches for existing answers to prevent duplicate work.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**2. Notebooks (Deep Data Work):**](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
      - [`Threads` analysis can be instantly transferred to a notebook for deep data science.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
      - [The AI agent in notebooks can generate complex code (Python, SQL) for tasks like predictive modeling.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [This accelerates expert workflows by providing a high-quality first draft.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [**3. Apps (Shareable Insights):**](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
      - [Notebooks can be published as low-code apps for easy distribution to non-technical users via a shareable link.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)

### The Technology: How Trust is Built

  - [Hex uses Claude Sonnet (v4.5) but ensures accuracy by providing it with rich, customer-defined context.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [**Semantic Models:** Define business logic for the AI:](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
      - [Metric definitions (e.g., "Closed Won Conversion Rate").](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Dimension descriptions (e.g., "UUX\_traffic\_ID7" → "Unique Website Visitors").](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2139.0)
      - [Table joins and relationships.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
  - [**Rules Files:** Enforce organizational standards (e.g., "for revenue questions, use this table").](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [**Endorsed Content:** Data teams can mark projects or tables as authoritative sources for the AI to prioritize.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

### Market Positioning & Brand

  - [**Competitive Landscape:**](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [**Legacy BI (Tableau, Looker):** Hex is now a direct competitor, offering a fundamentally different, AI-native approach.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [**Modern BI (Omni, Sigma):** Hex's AI capabilities and advanced analytics (Python support) are key differentiators.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
  - [**Brand Identity:**](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [**Tone:** Modern, innovative, irreverent, and "internet-brained."](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [**Positioning:** Challenges the status quo of legacy BI, framing it as an outdated process.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [**Future Vision:**](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2498.0)
      - [**Chat with your App:** Ask questions directly within a published app.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2517.0)
      - [**Ambient Analytics:** Proactive, scheduled analysis (e.g., a weekly report on top reps).](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2565.0)
      - [**Agentic Analytics:** The AI agent will become even more powerful and autonomous.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2498.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [**Quality Mandate:** All content must be high-quality and align with the CEO's specific tone.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2888.0)
      - [**Video:** Commercial-grade production, not simple screen recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2924.0)
      - [**Written:** Irreverent, quirky, and "internet-brained" style.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2924.0)
  - [**"Show, Don't Tell" Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2753.0)
      - [Create short vignettes showing the "old way" (request-queue) vs. the "new way" (instant AI answer).](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2753.0)
      - [Target specific user roles (e.g., growth marketer, sales leader).](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2753.0)
  - [**Content Placement:** Open to ideas for housing high-volume, top-of-funnel content (e.g., a separate section, SEO-only).](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=3061.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Develop content concepts demonstrating the "old way vs. new way" for specific user roles.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=2753.0)
  - [**Hex & GrowthX:** Discuss placement strategy for high-volume, top-of-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/xgp7aQDcgxf_MxuDnaMbzUb_ttzjFckC?tab=summary&timestamp=3061.0)
